mapper.select: SELECT account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, currency, balance, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified, ext_info, account_relation_id, owner_type FROM account WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, currency, balance, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified, ext_info, account_relation_id, owner_type FROM account WHERE account_relation_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account ( account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, currency, balance, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified, ext_info, account_relation_id, owner_type ) VALUES ( #{accountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currency,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{balance,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{extInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountRelationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ownerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, currency, balance, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified, ext_info, account_relation_id, owner_type FROM account WHERE account_id = #{accountId} FOR UPDATE
